title: Bridge Essay: Central nervous system regulation of brown adipose tissue.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Central, nervous, system, regulation, of.

**Central nervous system regulation of brown adipose tissue.** — Compr Physiol. PMID: 25428857. DOI: 10.1002/cphy.c140013. Thermogenesis, the production of heat energy, in brown adipose tissue is asignificant component of the homeostatic repertoire to maintain body temperature during the challenge of low environmental temperature in many species from mouse to man and plays akey role in elevating body temperature during the febrile response to infection. The sympathetic neural outflow determining brown adipose tissue (BAT) thermogenesis is regulated by neural networks in the CNS which increase BAT sympathetic nerve
